title: iknoe Insulated Lunch Bag, Foldable 8.5L Cooler Bag for Men & Women, Leakproof Thermal Design, Great for Office, Picnic, Travel, Lunch Box,Flower
features: 【INSULATED & STURDY】: 5mm pearl foam padding and eco-friendly PEVA lining of lunch boxes keep food warm or cold for 8 hours. Double-stitched zippers and premium metal dual zip pullers of lunch coolers ensure smooth open, rip-resistant and maximum durability.

【LEAKPROOF & WATERPROOF】: Eco-friendly PEVA soft liner food bag is easy to clean with just a wet cloth or napkin and against liquid penetration. The heat-welded seams prevent leaking. 600D durable Oxford surface is programmed for maximum tearing-resistant.

【LARGE CAPACITY & MUTI-POCKETS】: 10x6.69x7.92"(LxWxH) As a meal prep lunch bag, the main compartment could hold 24 cans or your three meals in a day. 1 zipper pocket, and 2 side mesh pockets could fit your keys, cards, phone chargers, napkins, water bottles, utensils, etc.

【PORTABLE & LIGHT-WEIGHT】: Ikone insulated lunch bag is featured with a handle on top and an adjustable and detachable shoulder strap, so you carry it with your hands or pull it over to your shoulders. The wide opening design makes lunch bags convenient to fill and take food. The lightweight (0.3kg) feature entitles it as lunch bags for women, men. You use this as a lunch bag, cooler bag, picnic bag, shopping bag, etc.

【MUTIPLE OCCASIONS & Present】: The women's and men's lunchbox for work could keep you enjoy healthy food anywhere you go, hiking, shopping, traveling, camping, working, fishing, picnics, beach, etc. It is also a perfect present for your families and friends. Women's Day Present
description: Introducing the Collapsible Insulated Lunch Bag, your perfect companion for keeping meals fresh and beverages cool on the go. This versatile thermal cooler tote is meticulously designed with a leakproof interior, ensuring that your food and drinks stay secure without any spills or messes. The large capacity is ideal for carrying multiple food containers, snacks, and drinks, making it perfect for work, picnics, or travel. Constructed from high-quality, durable materials, this lunch bag is built to withstand everyday use while maintaining its sleek appearance. Its collapsible design makes it easy to store when not in use, saving valuable space in your kitchen or car. The multi-pocket design provides ample room for all your essentials, including utensils, napkins, and personal items, keeping everything organized and easily accessible. Comfort is key with the Collapsible Insulated Lunch Bag, featuring sturdy handles and an optional shoulder strap for easy carrying. The exterior is wear-resistant, ensuring long-lasting use, while the interior is easy to clean, simplifying maintenance. This lunch bag is not just functional but also stylish, making it an excellent choice for adults alike. Invest in a lunch bag that offers a perfect blend of practicality, convenience, and style. Whether you're heading to the office, or enjoying outdoor activities, the Collapsible Insulated Lunch Bag ensures your meals are fresh and ready whenever you are.
